title: Becton, Dickinson And HP Among 13 Companies Announcing Annual Dividend Increases In The First Half Of November
text: Visa and Exxon Mobil announced dividend increases in October, with Visa increasing its dividend by 15.6% and Exxon Mobil increasing its dividend by 4.4%. Several companies, including AbbVie, American Electric Power, and McDonalds, met or exceeded dividend increase predictions in October. Dividend growth slowed for companies like Amphenol, Black Hills, and Tompkins Financial due to various factors such as the current economic slowdown and flat or lower earnings.

title: BD Named Among the 100 Best Corporate Citizens of 2023
text: Company Ranks Top 2 in Healthcare Equipment and Services Industry FRANKLIN LAKES, N.J. , Oct. 18, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) (NYSE: BDX), a leading global medical technology company, today announced it has been named to the 100 Best Corporate Citizens List by 3BL, which recognizes outstanding environmental, social and governance (ESG) transparency and performance among 1,000 of the largest U.S. public companies.

title: Dividend Income Update September 2023
text: With the start of the final quarter of 2023, it's time to take a look back at my previous month of dividend income. Getting close to that $2,000 milestone in a month sure looks amazing. I know, those end of quarter months are always the big payers but it's still nice to see.

title: BD Names Greg Rodetis as Senior Vice President of Investor Relations
text: FRANKLIN LAKES, N.J. , Oct. 17, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) (NYSE: BDX), a leading global medical technology company, today announced Greg Rodetis, currently BD senior vice president and treasurer will also add head of investor relations to his responsibilities, effective immediately.

title: BD, Casella Complete Industry-First Pilot Recycling 40,000 Pounds of Used Medical Devices
text: All Used Injection Devices Recycled; Next Stage of Pilot to Expand Regionally, Add Medical Devices FRANKLIN LAKES, N.J. and RUTLAND, Vt.

title: BD to Announce Fiscal 2023 Fourth Quarter and Full Year Financial Results
text: FRANKLIN LAKES, N.J., Oct. 12, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) (NYSE:BDX), a leading global medical technology company, today announced that it will report its fiscal 2023 fourth quarter and full year financial results on Thursday, November 9, 2023.

title: Becton, Dickinson Stock Is A Hold, Here's Why
text: Becton, Dickinson and Company is a global healthcare company specializing in medical supplies, devices, and diagnostic products. BDX saw solid growth in Q3 driven by strong demand for pharmacy automation systems and medical devices. The company raised its revenue guidance for FY23 and expects continued profitability improvement in the near future.
